FCCPC
Internal Commission Portal

Secure Access for Commission Staff

The FCCPC Anti-Competitive Practices Portal provides authorised staff with secure, role-based tools to manage petitions, investigations, exemptions, and enforcement operations.

🔐
Passwordless OTP authentication — no passwords stored
👥
6 role-based access levels with scoped dashboards
📋
Full case lifecycle management — intake to closure
🔒
NDPA-compliant data handling and full audit logging
